properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 117/14

BARENTS SEA
1. IN CONNECTION WITH  THE GOLIAT FIELD DEVELOPMENT A SUBSEA POWER CABLE WILL BE LAID JOINING  THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS (WGS84    DATUM)

   70-42.45N 23-48.77E
   70-43.76N 23-52.59E
   70-45.38N 23-48.95E
   70-47.41N 23-38.15E
   70-49.91N 23-31.72E
   70-52.09N 23-26.42E
   70-53.03N 23-19.29E 

AND FROM:

   71-01.03N 23-07.09E
   71-20.74N 22-22.48E
   71-19.04N 22-14.07E

THE  CABLE WILL BE UNPROTECTED IN PERIODS DURING THE INSTALLATION AND  FISHING VESSELS ARE ASKED TO BE CAUTIOUS WHEN FISHING NEAR THE CABLE.
INSTALLATION WORK WILL LAST FROM LATE JULY TILL NOVEMBER.
FOR FURTHER INFORMATION PLEASE CONTACT GUARD VESSEL ASPER MARIA, CALL SIGN LJCQ ON VHF CH 16 OR TELEPHONE 0047 915 57 339 

3. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 107/14
